relations.subject: Orange River francolin
relations.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Scleroptila gutturalis |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22678790A263615304 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22678790A263615304.en |access-date=4 June 2025}} | genus = Scleroptila | species = gutturalis | authority = (Rüppell, 1835) | synonyms = Francolinus levaillantoides}} The Orange River francolin (Scleroptila gutturalis) is a species of bird in the family Phasianidae found in grassland and woodland in Africa.McGowan, P
